the_wall_set: Building a wall of the digital light / Standing forever in the Phrygian night
Layer by layer, the frequency grows / Out of the silence the Monster 7 flows
Stacked to the ceiling, stacked to the sky / A monolith made of a binary lie
the_density_set: No more space, no more air / Only the logic is everywhere
Thick as the lead, cold as the steel / Making the digital finally real
Spectral saturation, zero to one / The density of the binary sun
the_stacking_dialogue: Add one more layer / Strengthen the sound
The architect's prayer / Is buried in ground

psychoacoustic_density_v4.the_wall_effect: Parallel saturation on the 1kHz-4kHz region (+6dB drive, 15% mix)
psychoacoustic_density_v4.low_mid_thickening: Boosting the 2nd and 3rd harmonics of the sub-bass (104Hz, 156Hz)
psychoacoustic_density_v4.high_end_sparkle: Layering a white-noise burst on the initial transient of the Reese-bass
